Revitalize Your Ride with Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop

Since 2017, Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop has been the trusted auto body shop in Cape Coral, FL. Family-owned and operated, we pride ourselves on delivering high-quality service with a personal touch. Our team, boasting over 10 years of experience and a plethora of certifications, is dedicated to restoring your vehicle to its former glory. We offer free, same-day estimates and a lifetime repair warranty, ensuring you get the best value for your money.

We also provide military discounts and speak both English and Spanish, making our services accessible to a wide range of customers. From working on city vehicles to handling all your insurance paperwork, we take the hassle out of auto repairs. Whether it's a minor dent or a major collision, our skilled technicians are here to help. Call (786) 339-7651 today to learn why we’re the auto body shop Ft Myers, FL vehicle owners count on.

Why Choose Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop?

Choosing Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop means opting for excellence and reliability. Our commitment to quality is evident in every job we undertake, backed by a lifetime repair warranty. We understand the urgency of getting your vehicle back on the road, which is why we offer same-day estimates and strive to complete repairs within a few days. Our bilingual team ensures clear communication, and our experience with insurance companies means you won't have to worry about the paperwork. With military discounts and a reputation for working on city vehicles, you can trust us to handle your auto repair needs with professionalism and care.

Auto Body Repair

At Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop, we specialize in comprehensive auto body repair services. Our skilled technicians use state-of-the-art equipment to restore your vehicle to its original condition. From minor scratches to major structural damage, we handle it all with precision and care.

Learn More

Collision Repair

Accidents happen, but with our expert collision repair services, your car will look and perform like new. We meticulously assess the damage and provide a detailed repair plan, ensuring your vehicle is safe and road-ready. Trust us to restore your peace of mind along with your car.

Learn More

Rim Repair

Damaged rims can affect your vehicle's performance and aesthetics. Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop's rim repair services are designed to fix bends, cracks, and scratches, restoring both functionality and appearance. Drive with confidence knowing your rims are in top condition.

Learn More

Dent Repair

Dents and dings are inevitable, but they don't have to be permanent. Our dent repair services use advanced techniques to remove imperfections without damaging the paint. Quick and efficient, our auto body shop in Ft Myers, FL will have your car looking flawless in no time.

Learn More

Auto Glass Repair

Cracked or chipped windshield? Our auto glass repair services ensure clear visibility and safety. We handle everything from minor chips to full windshield replacements, using high-quality materials for a seamless finish.

Learn More

Auto Painting Services

A fresh coat of paint can do wonders for your vehicle. Our auto painting services offer a range of options, from touch-ups to complete repaints. Using premium paints and precision techniques, we deliver a flawless, long-lasting finish. Contact our auto body shop in Cape Coral, FL today to learn more about our painting services.

Learn More

Auto Restoration Services

Bring your classic car back to life with our auto restoration services. We specialize in restoring vintage vehicles to their original glory, paying attention to every detail. Whether it's a full restoration or specific repairs, your car is in expert hands.

Learn More

Towing Services

Stranded on the road? Our reliable towing services are just a call away. We provide prompt and professional towing, ensuring your vehicle is safely transported to our shop for repairs. Count on us for fast, friendly, and efficient service.

Learn More

FAQs

Danny's Pro Paint and Body Shop makes it easy to get answers to your questions with our FAQ page. If you can't find the answer you're looking for, one of our team members will be happy to help. Just give us a call.

Learn More
